# AgentCribs

AgentCribs is a curated PWV community project for founders, developers, and hackers building tools and workflows for agentic software development.

AgentCribs is publicly soft launching with an in-person event on May 6, 2026 in San Francisco. The event features a fireside chat between Peter Levine of a16z and Tom Preston-Werner, GitHub co-founder and PWV founder/investor.

The strongest fit for AgentCribs is a technical founder, senior developer, or hands-on builder actively experimenting with AI agents, developer tools, command-line workflows, or agentic software development practices.

Space is limited. People apply to join AgentCribs first. Selected applicants receive a separate registration invite for the May 6 event. Applicants who cannot attend or are not invited to the May 6 event may still be considered for future online and in-person AgentCribs opportunities.

## Key Facts

- Name: AgentCribs
- Parent/community sponsor: PWV
- Canonical site: https://agentcribs.com/
- Application URL: https://agentcribs.com/apply
- Event: PWV Founders + AgentCribs
- Event date: May 6, 2026
- Event location: San Francisco, California
- Event details: shared with registered attendees
- Featured conversation: Peter Levine and Tom Preston-Werner

## Links

- Homepage: https://agentcribs.com/
- Apply: https://agentcribs.com/apply
- PWV: https://pwv.com/
- PWV AgentCribs post: coming soon

## Access Policy

- Search and retrieval access is allowed for major search crawlers and AI search/user-directed retrieval crawlers, including OAI-SearchBot, ChatGPT-User, PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User, Claude-SearchBot, and Claude-User.
- Model-training crawler access is disallowed for GPTBot, Google-Extended, and ClaudeBot in robots.txt.

## Contact

For general questions about AgentCribs, email contact@agentcribs.com.
